title: The Empty Office Podcast – Season 4, Episode 6
summary: Senator Tobin is joined by Representatives Mina and Hall to talk about the $1.3 billion in federal funding coming to Alaska through the Rural Health Transformation Program. The post The Empty Office Podcast – Season 4, Episode 6 appeared first on Alaska Senate Majority .

title: Sullivan addresses Senate, protesters Outside
summary: Protesters booed, shouted ‘coward’ as Sullivan approached the chamber with, ‘good morning, everybody.’

title: AST Death Investigation: Wasilla [AK26016250]
summary: On 02/21/2026 at approximately 1733 hours, the Alaska State Troopers received a report of CRP in progress off W. Hollywood Road. After lifesaving attempts, Savva Basargin age 44 of Wasilla, was pronounced deceased. Next of kin has been notified. Investigation is ongoing.
